parameters.item/BGV_x0020_Checks: @if(empty(variables('varSeverity')),'Form Filled and Cleared','Adverse PEV Checks - see severity')

parameters.body/messageBody:
PEV Checks Cleared


Candidate: @{outputs('Compose_ResponseCandidateName')}

Candidate ID: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/CandidateID']}

Employer: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerName']}

Employer HR Email: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerHR_Email']}

Request ID: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/RequestID']}


Candidate Folder: @{outputs('Compose_CandidateFolderLink')}


PEV checks are cleared. TAC form to be sent.

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
A High Severity PEV issue has been flagged.

Employer: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerName']}
Employer HR Email: @{outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerHR_Email']}
Candidate Folder: @{outputs('Compose_CandidateFolderLink')}

Severity: High

Details:
@{outputs('Compose_NotifyBodyHtml')}

@concat('

A PEV response has been received for ',outputs('Compose_ResponseCandidateName'),'.


Request ID: ',outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/RequestID'],'
Employer: ',outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerName'],'
Employer HR Email: ',outputs('Update_item_-_of_BGV_Request')?['body/EmployerHR_Email'],'
Verification Status: Responded
Severity: ',if(empty(variables('varSeverity')),'',variables('varSeverity')),'
Flagged Issues: ',if(empty(trim(variables('varOutcome'))),'None',if(startsWith(variables('varOutcome'),', '),substring(variables('varOutcome'),2,sub(length(variables('varOutcome')),2)),variables('varOutcome'))),'


Candidate Folder: ',outputs('Compose_CandidateFolderLink'),'


Details:
',outputs('Compose_NotifyBodyHtml'),'

',if(empty(variables('varSeverity')),'

PEV checks are cleared. TAC form to be sent.

','

For more detailed information, please refer to the report summary in the candidate folder. A Teams post with the report link will be sent when the report summary file is ready.

'))
